notes: Standard 468x60 banner format; replaced by display ad standards and programmatic
Animation/interactivity; constrained by dial-up bandwidth in 1998; evolved into video pre-roll
Core programmatic infrastructure; evolved into DSP/SSP ecosystem
Primary campaign measurement metric in 1998; still used though supplemented by attribution
Third-party cookies being phased out by browsers 2020-2024
Cost-per-thousand impressions; remained dominant pricing model through 2026
